# Noctua CAD Preview Assets

`nf-a14-public-cad-preview.json` is a browser-preview mesh derived from Noctua's public NF-A14 CAD download.

Source page: https://www.noctua.at/en/3d-cad-models

Source download page: https://www.noctua.at/en/products/nf-a14-pwm/downloads

Use in this project is limited to visualizing purchased Noctua fans in the assembled 3D preview. Do not include this asset in printable exports, manufacturing files, or performance simulations.
